temporal_description: A group of people, mostly young, are seen running in a panicked and disorganized manner. The scene is dark and chaotic, suggesting a moment of crisis or escape. The central figure, a young woman with long dark hair, is in the foreground, her face filled with fear as she looks back. To her left, a young man with dark hair runs with an expression of terror. Other figures are visible behind them, all moving quickly through the dimly lit space. The environment is a dark, possibly wooden interior, with vertical structures like beams or railings creating a sense of confinement. The camera is shaky, following the frantic movement of the group, creating a sense of urgency and chaos. In the top right corner, the white Chinese characters "风行网" are visible. The audio is a chaotic and intense soundscape dominated by a loud, high-energy, and dramatic orchestral score. The music is fast-paced and percussive, creating a powerful sense of urgency, danger, and action, as if from an action or fantasy film. Layered over the music are the sounds of a large group of people running and shouting in a panicked, high-pitched manner, adding to the feeling of a desperate escape. The camera cuts to a low-angle, shaky shot looking up at a group of figures in silhouette. They appear to be climbing or scrambling upwards through a dark, debris-filled space. The lighting is minimal, casting long shadows and obscuring details. The "风行网" text remains in the top right corner. The camera pans across a group of young people, their faces etched with fear and concern. In the center, a young woman with long, dark hair and a striped shirt looks on with wide, worried eyes. To her left, another young woman with a similar expression is visible, and to her right, a young man with a look of apprehension. They are all dressed in what appears to be school uniforms. The background is dark and indistinct, with vertical bars or structures framing the shot. The "风行网" text is still present in the top right. The camera cuts to a medium shot of a man standing amidst the chaos. He is wearing a dark, possibly leather, jacket over a vest and a light-colored shirt. He looks forward with a determined or concerned expression. The background is a dark, fiery, and destroyed interior, with glowing embers and debris filling the space. The "风行网" text is visible in the top right corner. A male voice cuts through the cacophony, shouting a single word with urgency and alarm: "纳威!" (Neville!). His tone is one of desperate warning, as if calling out to someone in a perilous situation. The camera is shaky and moves erratically, following the action as the group continues to move through the dark, fiery environment. The figures are silhouetted against the bright, chaotic background of fire and destruction. The "风行网" text remains in the top right corner.
